title: Creamy Brazilian Chicken Stew
description: A delicious and comforting stew made with chicken, melted cheese, and Brazilian spices.

ingredients.name: Brazilian spice blend
ingredients.notes: containing cumin, coriander, and chili powder

instructions: Heat the stew sauce in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the milk to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the melted mozzarella cheese until melted and smooth.
Season with the Brazilian spice blend to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
